segments.text: Then Zophar, the Naamathite, answered,
Shouldn’t the multitude of words be answered? Should a man full of talk be justified?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Should your boastings make men hold their peace? When you mock, will no man make you ashamed?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: For you say, ‘My doctrine is pure. I am clean in your eyes.’
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: But oh that God would speak, and open his lips against you,
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text:
that he would show you the secrets of wisdom! For true wisdom has two sides. 
Know therefore that God exacts of you less than your iniquity deserves.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: “Can you fathom the mystery of God? Or can you probe the limits of the Almighty?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: They are high as heaven. What can you do? They are deeper than Sheol.  What can you know?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Its measure is longer than the earth, and broader than the sea.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: If he passes by, or confines, or convenes a court, then who can oppose him?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: For he knows false men. He sees iniquity also, even though he doesn’t consider it.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: An empty-headed man becomes wisewhen a man is born as a wild donkey’s colt.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: “If you set your heart aright, stretch out your hands toward him.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: If iniquity is in your hand, put it far away. Don’t let unrighteousness dwell in your tents.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Surely then you will lift up your face without spot. Yes, you will be steadfast, and will not fear,
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text:
for you will forget your misery. 
You will remember it like waters that have passed away.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Life will be clearer than the noonday. Though there is darkness, it will be as the morning.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: You will be secure, because there is hope. Yes, you will search, and will take your rest in safety.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Also you will lie down, and no one will make you afraid. Yes, many will court your favor.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text:
But the eyes of the wicked will fail. They will have no way to flee. 
Their hope will be the giving up of the spirit.
segments.speaker: Zophar
